phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è il laboratorio di intarsio, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH eel la-boh-RAH-toh-ryoh dee een-TAR-syo, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: On the ground floor, on the left.

responses.english: On the ground floor, on the left.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa questo cammeo, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh KOH-stah KWEH-stoh kam-MEH-oh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated on the tag.

responses.english: It is indicated on the tag.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, si possono fare ordini personalizzati, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, see POS-soh-noh FAH-reh OR-dee-nee per-soh-nah-lid-DZAH-tee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: You must speak with the artisan.

responses.english: You must speak with the artisan.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, spedite anche all'estero, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, speh-DEE-teh AN-keh al-LES-teh-roh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, si può fotografare il lavoro, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh see pwoh foh-toh-grah-FAH-reh eel lah-VOH-roh pehr fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, you can photograph without flash.

responses.english: Yes, you can photograph without flash.
